title: OSSC – CGL Specialist – 199 Posts

basic_details.job_title: OSSC CGL Specialist Recruitment Exam 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 199 Posts
basic_details.short_information: OSSC CGL Specialist Recruitment 2026: 199 Food Safety Officer, Junior Laboratory Assistant and More vacancies. Apply online from 09 June to 8 July 2026 at ossc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Odisha Staff Selection Commission (OSSC), Unit-II, Bhubaneswar-751009
basic_details.application_mode: Online only through www.ossc.gov.in. No physical/hard copy to be submitted.

age_limit.age_details: Must be able to read, write and speak Odia fluently. Must have passed Middle School with Odia as subject / Matriculation with Odia as medium / Class-VII exam with Odia as subject / ME standard Odia test conducted by School and Mass Education Department.

qualification.education_qualification: Varies by post - from Bachelor's Degree in relevant discipline (Science/Technology/Food Technology/Commerce/Economics/Fine Arts/Library Science/Computer Science etc.) to Post-Graduate Degree or professional qualifications like ICWAI(Inter)/ICMAI(Inter). Must have requisite qualification by the last date of submission of the Online Application Form. Qualification must be from AICTE/UGC recognized institution.

selection_process: Stage-I: Preliminary Examination → Stage-II: Main Written Examination + Computer Skill Test → Stage-III: Certificate Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the OSSC official website www.ossc.gov.in. No physical/hard copy of the Online Application Form is to be sent to OSSC. Candidates applying for the first time must register as "NEW USER" and proceed to fill the Online Registration/Application Form. Registered users can log in with their User ID and Password. Detailed step-by-step procedure is available on the website. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid the last-hour rush.
seo_tags: Odisha Staff Selection Commission CGL Specialist Recruitment 2026
